admission process jiseee requirements ru: JIS University offers a seamless admission process. Candidates can apply online via the official website or visit the campus admission cell.
Admissions for most programs are based on merit or the JIS University Entrance Exam (JET). For specialized courses like B.Tech, scores from WBJEE or JEE Main are highly valued.
engineering courses streams btech comput: The B.Tech engineering programs at JIS University are cutting edge. We offer B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) with specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AI & ML), Cyber Security, Data Science, and IoT.
We also offer core engineering disciplines such as Civil, Electrical, and Electronics & Communication Engineering.
law courses llb bba-llb llm juridical sc: The School of Juridical Science offers BCI-approved programs including a 3-year LLB, an integrated 5-year BBA-LLB, and a 2-year LLM with specializations in Criminal, Corporate, and Constitutional Law.
management courses bba mba business hosp: JIS University's Management department offers industry-focused BBA and MBA programs. Specializations include Hospital Management, Digital Marketing, Finance, and Human Resource Management.
pharmacy courses bpharm dpharm mpharm cl: Our Pharmacy programs are PCI-approved. We offer D.Pharm, B.Pharm, and M.Pharm with specializations in Pharmacology and Pharmaceutics, preparing students for the healthcare industry.
campus life hostels clubs sports facilit: Campus life at JIS University is incredibly vibrant! The campus features modern labs, a central library, digital classrooms, separate hostels for boys and girls, and extensive sports facilities.
Students can join various cultural, technical, and sports clubs, and participate in our massive annual university fest.
examination routines dates semester sche: Semester examinations are conducted twice a year (Odd Semesters in Nov/Dec and Even Semesters in May/June).
It is strictly required to maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be eligible for university examinations.
location address routing maps where is i: JIS University is located at Agarpara, Kolkata, West Bengal (Near Kalyani Expressway), easily accessible via public transport and university shuttles.
placement cell jobs package companies sa: Our highly active Training and Placement Cell ensures excellent career outcomes. We conduct mock interviews, aptitude training, and corporate grooming.
Top recruiters include TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and leading pharmaceutical and engineering firms.
fees structure cost tuition semester fee: Fee structures vary by program. However, JIS University is highly committed to affordable education and offers various scholarships based on academic merit, sports quota, and government schemes like the Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship.
transport bus facility route commute tra: Dedicated transport facilities are available. Our bus fleets ply across major routes in Kolkata and surrounding districts, ensuring a safe commute for students.
library books digital resources reading: The central library is a hub of knowledge, equipped with thousands of books, physical journals, and e-resources. Students get 24/7 access to the digital library portal.
hi hello hey greetings good morning stat: Hello! Welcome to JIS University Intelligence. I am CHATJIS, your personal AI assistant. How can I help you explore our university today?
bye goodbye exit thank you clear close: Thank you for exploring JIS University! Best of luck with your future endeavors. Have a wonderful day!
